transform_config.description: Scale transformation to apply to predictions and oracle output prior to scoring. The transformation is applied to all transformable output types associated with a target; non-transformable output types are scored on the natural scale only. See hubEvals::score_model_out() for details.

fun.description: Name of the transform function to apply. Must be one of the transforms supported by the hubverse dashboards.

args.description: Optional additional named arguments to pass to the transform function, beyond the data being transformed (e.g. `offset` for `log_shift`). Keys must match the argument names of the chosen function (excluding the data argument `x`).

append.description: If true (default), transformed-scale scores are produced as separate columns alongside natural-scale scores, so both are available for display. If false, only transformed-scale scores are produced.

label.description: Optional human-readable label for the transformed scale (e.g. 'log'). If null or omitted, a label is inferred from the function name at runtime.

schema_version.description: URL to a version of the hubPredEvalsData config_schema.json file. Used to declare the schema version a 'predevals-config.yml' file is compatible with. The URL provided should be the URL to the raw content of the schema file on GitHub.

transform_defaults.description: Optional default scale transformation applied to all targets that do not set their own `transform` property. Targets may override or opt out via `transform: false`.

targets.description: Targets for which to compute evaluation metrics, as well as a specification of how predictions for each target should be computed.

target_id.description: The target id, matching a value given in the target_metadata.target_id field in the hub's tasks_config.json file

metrics.description: Names of metrics to compute for this target.  These should be names of metrics supported by hubEvals::score_model_out.

relative_metrics.description: Optional names of metrics for which to compute pairwise relative skill for this target.  These should be a subset of the metrics for the target.

baseline.description: Name of the model to use as a baseline for relative skill metrics for this target. Required if relative_metrics is provided.

disaggregate_by.description: Optional list of task id columns to disaggregate by. Aggregated scores for each model will always be computed.

transform.description: Optional per-target scale transformation, applied to all transformable output types associated with the target. Either a transform_config object (overriding any transform_defaults) or the literal `false` to opt this target out of a configured transform_defaults.

eval_sets.description: Specification of sets of prediction tasks to use for score computations. The settings `min_round_id` and `n_last_round_ids` determine which modeling rounds are included. The evaluation set may also contain other properties, where the property name is the name of a task id variable and the property value is an array of values for that task id variable to include in the evaluation set. If multiple criteria are provided, they are combined with 'and' logic, i.e. the evaluation set will include the intersection of the sets of prediction tasks specified by those criteria.

eval_set_name.description: A name for the evaluation set

round_filters.description: Optional object specifying filters on the modeling round id.

min.description: Minimum round to include in the evaluation set, optional. Prior rounds will be excluded from the evaluation. The order of rounds is taken from the hub's tasks.json config file.

n_last.description: Number of trailing rounds to include in the evaluation set, optional. The last n rounds with any available model output will be included in the evaluation. The order of rounds is taken from the hub's tasks.json config file.

task_filters.description: Optional object specifying filters on task id variables. The property name is the name of a task id variable and the property value is an array of values for that task id variable to include in the evaluation set.

task_id_text.description: Optional mapping of hub task id values to text. Keys are `task_id`s and values are an object whose keys are `task_id` `value`s and values are human-readable text.

rounds_idx.description: Required 0-based index of the `rounds` entry to use for evaluation.

initial_sort_column.description: Optional column name to use as the initial sort column in the predevals scores table. Must be one of the columns in the output scores table (e.g. "model_id", "wis", "n"). Relative skill metrics appear as "<metric>_scaled_relative_skill" (e.g. "wis_scaled_relative_skill").
